data.body:
Investigation RESULT: confirmed.
ROOT_CAUSE: sprint-next-batch.sh:284 calls 'ticket list' without --status filter. ticket-list.sh only supports single-value --status (no comma-separated multi-value). Python inline filter at line 611 is the sole guard, but this is fragile — any bypass exposes closed tasks.
FIX: (1) Update ticket-list.sh to support comma-separated --status values. (2) Change sprint-next-batch.sh:284 to --status=open,in_progress.
NOTE: The 3 tasks in the bug report (967c-0e1b, 63c0-9471, 73fb-4638) are currently open — bug may have been transient or was reset. Fix addresses root correctness issue regardless.
RED_TEST: Add to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh — closed task must not appear in TASK: output.
